source_metadata.title: 2024/12/12 - Petitions
source_metadata.description:
12 December 2024 | Petitions Committee

Petition of Paul Barton: Make Motor Neurone Disease a Notifiable Disease; Petition of Mark Baldwin: Remove certain prescribing restrictions for Nurse Practitioners

Petition of Paul Barton: Make Motor Neurone Disease a Notifiable Disease

Paul Barton

Ministry of Health:
- Dr Nicholas Jones, Director of Public Health, Public Health Agency

Petition of Mark Baldwin: Remove certain prescribing restrictions for Nurse Practitioners

Mark Baldwin

Nurse Practitioners New Zealand:
- Chelsea Willmott, Chair NPNZ

Medsafe:
- Chris James, Group Manager
- Matthew Spencer, Manager, Product Regulation
- Susan Kenyon, Manager, Clinical Risk Management
- Michael Haynes, Manager & Licensing Authority, Medicines Control
